name: PT Multi Indocitra Tbk
summary: PT Multi Indocitra Tbk produces and trades in baby and health care products, and cosmetics in Indonesia. The company offers baby products and healthcare products, including bottle, nipple, breast feeding accs, feeding accs, nursing accs, healthcare accs, teether, pacifier, breast pads and pumps, baby wipes, baby and kids toiletries, and baby skin care products; personal care products, such as face and compact powder, two way cake, facial foam, and moisturizer; and cosmetics, which includes body lotions, hand gels, lip care, lipstiks, eyes shadows, and make up. It also provides skincare products consists of shower cream and bubble foam shower; hotwheels, barbie, thomas & friends, fisher price, and mega bloks; shaver and refill cartridges; adult and baby diapers; gummy vitamin for kids, adult, beauty, and expectant mom; air fresheners; kitchen cleaners; floor cleaners; cleaner for all surfaces and glasses; ready to drink soya milk; lampu LEDs, daylight and warmwhite bulbs, and flood lights; and viva face tonic, milk cleansers, scin foods, air mawar, eye brow pencils, and liquid foundations. In addition, the company offers food and beverage products, including lexus, oat crunch, samudra, crackers, topmix, and funmixed munchy's; ota moruku, crack potato, miaowmiaow, omypop, and mini rice crack potatoes; waisun, southern, marshmallow, and lot sour 100 candies; and d'best birdness, guava, tea, soya starway, dolphin, and wanfa drink beverages. It sells its brands under the Pigeon and Lock&Lock brands name. The company offers its products through its own distribution centers, as well as third party suppliers and sub-distributors. PT Multi Indocitra Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia.
